title: atelophragma rusbyi
intro: Atelophragma rusbyi, also known as Rusby's Atelophragma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Peru and Bolivia. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. The health benefits of Atelophragma rusbyi include its potential to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and congestion, and its antioxidant properties, which may aid in protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Atelophragma rusbyi is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, typically in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
